chronologyInvariants.rule: No explicit dated event may exceed year 1680 in Chapter 1 outputs.
chronologyInvariants.enforcement: Reject segment if year token > 1680 is detected.

chronologyInvariants.rule: Civil War era references are disallowed in present-tense chapter reality.
Later descendants (e.g., Alexis line) cannot enter early chapter active cast before chronology window.
chronologyInvariants.enforcement: Gate descendant entities to metadata links only when chapter window is <=1680.

futureArcConstraints.mustPreserve: External-contact pressure remains latent and unresolved by chapter close.
futureArcConstraints.forbiddenResolution: No treaty, no final authority settlement, no decisive peace.

futureArcConstraints.mustPreserve: Future chapter hooks must remain available: 2:1680-1690, 3:1690-1714, 4:1714-1735.
futureArcConstraints.forbiddenResolution: Do not resolve succession or identity rupture in chapter 1.

futureArcConstraints.mustPreserve: Matriarchal conduit inheritance pressure remains active and unresolved through protected ancestral line.
futureArcConstraints.forbiddenResolution: Do not collapse lineage transfer to a resolved descendant endpoint in early chapters.
